data.title: Britvic PLC Reports Major Shareholding Change
data.description:
Britvic (GB:BVIC) has released an update.

Britvic PLC has announced a change in share ownership as Societe Generale’s voting rights have crossed a significant threshold, now standing at 4.300600% with 10,704,530 direct voting rights as of October 8, 2024. This marks a decrease from the previous notification where Societe Generale held 5.462600% of voting rights, indicating a significant sale or redistribution of shares.

For further insights into GB:BVIC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tirupati Graphite Advances Amidst Challenges
data.description:
Tirupati Graphite Plc (GB:TGR) has released an update.

Tirupati Graphite Plc, a key player in the flake graphite market critical for the global energy transition, has reported operational progress despite financial constraints, with the Vatomina project in Madagascar producing and selling over 600 tons of high-grade graphite. The company has made strides in securing finance for growth and operations, including negotiations with a strategic investor and a Middle East Sovereign Fund. Additionally, they have received significant VAT refunds and have been granted an extension for submitting their audited annual report.

For further insights into GB:TGR stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Deliveroo Advances to New Listing Category
data.description:
Deliveroo plc Class A (GB:ROO) has released an update.

Deliveroo plc has successfully transitioned its ordinary shares from the equity shares (transition) category to the equity shares (commercial companies) category on the Official List, as recognized by the Financial Conduct Authority. The change, effective from 8.00 a.m. on October 10, 2024, signifies Deliveroo’s adherence to regulatory standards and its continued evolution within the financial markets.

For further insights into GB:ROO stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks UK Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: U-NEXT Announces Stock Split to Widen Investor Base
data.description:
U-NEXT HOLDINGS Co.Ltd. (JP:9418) has released an update.

U-NEXT HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. has announced a stock split aimed at making its shares more accessible to individual investors, following record-high financial performance and resumed dividend payments leading to a share price increase. The 3-for-1 stock split will not affect the company’s capital or its shareholder benefit program. The change, effective December 1, 2024, will increase the liquidity of shares and expand the investor base, aligning with Japan’s shift from savings to investment and the bullish stock market.

For further insights into JP:9418 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Japan Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: BlackRock Throgmorton Trust’s Share Buyback Update
data.description:
BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP (GB:THRG) has released an update.

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC has announced the buyback of 125,000 of its Ordinary Shares at an average price of 601.78 pence each, to be held as treasury stock. After the transaction is settled on October 11, 2024, the company’s issued share capital will be 88,296,864 Ordinary Shares, with treasury shares constituting 14.45% of the total share capital. The market has been advised to use the post-settlement figure for reporting purposes, excluding treasury-held shares.

For further insights into GB:THRG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Critica Limited Director Boosts Shareholdings
data.description:
Venture Minerals Limited (AU:CRI) has released an update.

Nicholas Luigi Cernotta, a director of Critica Limited, has increased his indirect holdings in the company, acquiring 1,514,764 ordinary shares and 3,318,452 share rights, issued in lieu of director fees and superannuation contributions. The new acquisitions bring Cernotta’s indirect share count to 6,777,922, along with maintaining a holding of 30,000,000 unlisted options. These transactions are part of a compensation plan approved by shareholders, with share rights vesting quarterly and subject to the company’s stock volume-weighted average price.

For further insights into AU:CRI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Australian Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Oxford Nanopore Announces Major Share Issue
data.description:
Oxford Nanopore Technologies PLC (GB:ONT) has released an update.

Oxford Nanopore Technologies PLC is set to issue over 12 million new ordinary shares to fulfill obligations under its 2021 Long-Term Incentive Plan, with the new shares expected to be admitted to the London Stock Exchange on October 14, 2024. This move reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to its stakeholders and its ambition to advance DNA and RNA analysis technology globally. Interested parties are directed to the company’s investor and media contacts for further information.

For further insights into GB:ONT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Esseco Secures Approval for Investment in Ercros
data.description:
Ercros SA (ES:ECR) has released an update.

Esseco Industrial S.p.A. has received authorization from the Spanish Council of Ministers for a direct foreign investment in Ercros S.A., following a favorable report from the Foreign Investments Board. This approval is a crucial step in Esseco’s voluntary public offer to acquire Ercros, satisfying one of the key conditions mentioned in the offer. Furthermore, other conditions related to French and European Commission authorizations have lapsed as they were deemed not necessary.

For further insights into ES:ECR stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Spain Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Sugi Holdings Reports Growth and Expansion
data.description:
Sugi Holdings Co (JP:7649) has released an update.

Sugi Holdings Co. Ltd. reports a 2.8% increase in existing-store sales and a 17.2% increase in all-store sales for September 2024, driven by the Sugi Pharmacy Business. During the month, the company expanded its reach by opening 13 new stores while closing 2, bringing the total to 1,986 stores. These numbers reflect the company’s ongoing business growth and strategic store management.

For further insights into JP:7649 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BlackRock Acquires 4.37% Stake in KBC Group
data.description:
KBC Group SA/NV (GB:0EYG) has released an update.

KBC Group NV has announced that BlackRock now holds a 4.37% interest in the company following a structural change within the BlackRock group. The notification, which is not related to threshold crossing, comes after BlackRock’s acquisition of Global Infrastructure Partners and subsequent reorganization. Full details of the change in holdings can be found on KBC Group’s website.

For further insights into GB:0EYG stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
